categories.name: Programming
categories.description: Books about coding and software development

books.title: Harry Potter
books.author: J.K. Rowling
books.description: A young wizard named Harry discovers his magical heritage and attends Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry while confronting the dark wizard Voldemort.

books.title: The Great Gatsby
books.author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
books.description: A classic novel set in the Jazz Age that explores wealth, love, and the American Dream through the mysterious millionaire Jay Gatsby.

books.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
books.author: Harper Lee
books.description: A powerful story about racial injustice in the American South seen through the eyes of a young girl named Scout Finch.

books.author: George Orwell
books.description: A dystopian novel depicting a totalitarian society ruled by Big Brother where surveillance and propaganda control every aspect of life.

books.title: The Catcher in the Rye
books.author: J.D. Salinger
books.description: A coming-of-age story about Holden Caulfield, a teenager wandering New York City while struggling with identity and alienation.

books.title: Pet Sematary
books.author: Stephen King
books.description: A horror novel about a burial ground that brings the dead back to life with terrifying consequences.

books.title: C++ Primer 5th edition
books.author: Stanley B.Lippman
books.description: A comprehensive guide to learning C++ programming covering modern C++ features and best practices.

books.title: Where The Crawdads Sing
books.author: Della Owens
books.description: A mystery novel about a young girl who grows up isolated in the marsh and becomes the prime suspect in a local murder.

books.title: The Hobbit
books.author: J.R.R Tolkien
books.description: Bilbo Baggins embarks on an unexpected adventure with a group of dwarves to reclaim their stolen treasure from the dragon Smaug.

books.title: The Lord Of The Rings
books.author: J.R.R Tolkien
books.description: An epic fantasy trilogy about the quest to destroy the One Ring and defeat the dark lord Sauron.

books.title: Mastering ChatGPT for Beginners
books.author: Shane Corbitt
books.description: A beginner-friendly guide explaining how to effectively use ChatGPT for productivity, learning, and content creation.

books.title: Make American Great Again
books.author: Donald J.Trump
books.description: A political book outlining Donald Trump's vision for economic growth, immigration policy, and national security.

books.title: Clean Code
books.author: Robert C. Martin
books.description: A famous programming book teaching developers how to write readable, maintainable, and high-quality code.

books.title: The Pragmatic Programmer
books.author: Andrew Hunt
books.description: A classic programming guide offering practical advice and principles for becoming a better software developer.

books.title: Atomic Habits
books.author: James Clear
books.description: A self-help book that explains how small daily habits can lead to remarkable long-term personal improvement.

books.title: A Game of Thrones
books.author: George R.R. Martin
books.description: The first book in the epic fantasy series A Song of Ice and Fire featuring political intrigue and battles for the Iron Throne.

books.title: The Name of the Wind
books.author: Patrick Rothfuss
books.description: The story of Kvothe, a legendary figure recounting his life as a gifted magician, musician, and adventurer.

books.title: Murder on the Orient Express
books.author: Agatha Christie
books.description: Detective Hercule Poirot investigates a mysterious murder that occurs aboard the luxurious Orient Express train.

books.title: The Hound of the Baskervilles
books.author: Arthur Conan Doyle
books.description: Sherlock Holmes investigates a terrifying legend involving a supernatural hound haunting the Baskerville family.

books.title: The ABC Murders
books.author: Agatha Christie
books.description: Hercule Poirot hunts a serial killer who leaves alphabetical clues before each murder.

books.title: Gone Girl
books.author: Gillian Flynn
books.description: A psychological thriller about the mysterious disappearance of a woman and the secrets within her marriage.

books.title: Doraemon Vol. 1
books.author: Fujiko F. Fujio
books.description: The first volume of the famous manga about Doraemon, a robotic cat from the future who helps a boy named Nobita.

books.title: Detective Conan Vol. 1
books.author: Gosho Aoyama
books.description: A teenage detective is transformed into a child and continues solving complex mysteries while hiding his identity.

books.title: Inuyasha Vol. 1
books.author: Rumiko Takahashi
books.description: A fantasy manga where a modern girl travels to feudal Japan and joins the half-demon Inuyasha on a quest.

books.title: Naruto Vol. 1
books.author: Masashi Kishimoto
books.description: The story of Naruto Uzumaki, a young ninja who dreams of becoming the strongest leader of his village.

books.title: One Piece Vol. 1
books.author: Eiichiro Oda
books.description: Monkey D. Luffy begins his journey to become the Pirate King by searching for the legendary treasure One Piece.

books.title: The Prince
books.author: Niccolò Machiavelli
books.description: A classic political treatise discussing power, leadership, and the strategies rulers use to maintain control.

books.title: The Art of War
books.author: Sun Tzu
books.description: An ancient Chinese military strategy book widely used in warfare, business, and leadership.

books.title: On Liberty
books.author: John Stuart Mill
books.description: A philosophical work defending individual freedom and the importance of liberty in society.

books.title: The 7 Habits of Highly Effective People
books.author: Stephen R. Covey
books.description: A famous self-development book teaching principles for personal and professional effectiveness.

books.title: Think and Grow Rich
books.author: Napoleon Hill
books.description: A motivational classic that explores the mindset and habits needed to achieve financial success.

books.title: Code Complete
books.author: Steve McConnell
books.description: A comprehensive guide to software construction, covering coding practices, debugging, and software quality.
